slots.project_description: An LLM-driven system that automates embedded-IoT software development: it takes a developer's natural-language requirement, resolves the required hardware libraries, generates embedded firmware, compiles it, and deploys/tests it on real hardware in a hardware-in-the-loop loop (AutoEmbed-style). COMP6733 IoT research project (UNSW 26T2), 5-person team.
slots.project_scale_target: Small / academic. A demonstrable research prototype evaluated over a benchmark of embedded-IoT tasks (AutoEmbed-style ~71 modules / ~350 tasks as the reference scope), not a production-scale service.
slots.primary_concern: generated-firmware correctness, reproducible evaluation results, and end-to-end pipeline reliability (natural-language requirement to compiled, real-hardware-verified firmware), with fast iteration toward a working demo
out_of_scope_items: security and compliance hardening for public deployment
UI/UX polish beyond what the demo needs
slots.project_audience: The COMP6733 teaching team (markers/supervisor) and our own 5-person team during the project; the system's intended end users are embedded-IoT developers who want to generate working firmware from natural-language requirements.
project_non_goals: No security/compliance guarantees for public deployment
No hardware-platform breadth beyond demonstration/evaluation needs
slots.project_performance_floor: No hard runtime floor. The working target is AutoEmbed-comparable code-generation accuracy and task success rate on the evaluation benchmark, plus the closed-loop demo completing within the demonstration time budget.
slots.tech_stack: Python (LLM orchestration / agent layer) + C/C++ embedded firmware (Arduino / PlatformIO) + a cloud LLM API (Claude / GPT). Planned; greenfield, not yet scaffolded.
slots.repo_structure: TBD (greenfield). doc/ currently holds the course brief, the proposal rubric, and the AutoEmbed reference paper. Source layout to be established at first scaffold.
slots.dependency_flow: TBD. Expected high-level flow: orchestration/agent layer (Python) -> library-resolution and code-generation modules -> firmware build/deploy (Arduino/PlatformIO toolchain) -> hardware-in-the-loop test harness.
slots.backend_change_lane: N/A - no backend database or server tier
